name: 宪法与《权利法案》
subject: history
domain_name: Period 1-3 殖民与革命 Colonial & Revolution (1491-1800)
curriculum_points: Explain the causes and effects of the settlement of the West from 1877 to 1898.
The desire for access to natural and mineral resources and the hope of many settlers for economic opportunities or religious refuge led to an increased migration to and settlement in the West.
Westward migration was boosted during and after the Civil War by the passage of new legislation promoting western transportation and economic development.

excerpts.text: Explain the causes and effects of the settlement of the West from 1877 to 1898.
The desire for access to natural and mineral resources and the hope of many settlers for economic opportunities or religious refuge led to an increased migration to and settlement in the West.
Westward migration was boosted during and after the Civil War by the passage of new legislation promoting western transportation and economic development.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「宪法与《权利法案》」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Explain the causes and effects of the settlement of the West from 1877 to 1898.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：The desire for access to natural and mineral resources and the hope of many sett… 对理解「宪法与《权利法案》」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
